fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. A single demo-viewer application exercises components from all viewers using arbitrary data. 2. A root-level domain selector switches between different domains. 3. Every major shared component (tree, tabs, panels, floating panels, graph3d, code viewer, theme) is demonstrated. 4. The demo-viewer builds and runs via viewer-ctl.
fields.title: [viewer-api] Build demo-viewer exercising all viewer components with root-level domain selection
